candidate: efficiency-thesis F-series: kernel-store-bytes (M4 byte premise, f1) + verifier-offload pivot (M1/M5/HC3, f2)
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record per docs/next/research-engine.md SS2.1, at registry/assessments/<id>.json alongside f2b-replicate, compression-census and define-op-census. BATCHED by family per docs/next/programme-completion-loop.md critical-path item 1 (f1/f2 = the EFFICIENCY batch; the G-series semantics batch is a separate assessment by a separate agent and is not touched here). Both experiments are FROZEN records with mechanical verdicts; this record interprets, it changes nothing: registry/verdicts/f1.json (PASS, audit CONFIRMED) and registry/verdicts/f2.json (FAIL, audit N/A) stand exactly as issued.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per docs/next/opus-execution-practices.md practice 4 and the kern Fable/Opus execution split: verdict-gen produced the mechanical verdicts (pure functions of the frozen SAPs + chained logs); what those outcomes MEAN for the efficiency thesis is decided here and only here. Consistency constraint honoured: registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json is the DONE interpretation of the f2b verifier-offload replication; this record reads f2 CONSISTENTLY with it and does not re-litigate it. Scope = registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json only (audit-status.jsonl is central custody; not touched).

corrections: registry/corrections/f1/1-prefreeze-correction.json (pre-signoff reset-refreeze: latency endpoint deferred to F5; store-scale IV collapsed to the committed lexical-wn31 corpus; coverage_requirement removed as not scientifically apt for a model-free byte ratio)

audit.note: no cross-vendor audit exists for f2 — the audit gate fires on PASS only; every f2 number below is therefore MEASURED-UNAUDITED

f2.postmortem: bead kernel-of-truth-97r (descriptive per-arm cells + the ext_vector instrument-artifact correction live in its comments)

f2b_replicate_assessment.status: DONE — read for continuity, NOT reinterpreted here; its envelope-scoped PASS reading is adopted verbatim wherever this record touches the f2b line

_surprise_note: No registered prior exists in claim.md form for either record (pre-D1). Informally: f1's PASS was the design's expected direction (design-efficiency-track.md F1: 'expected pass'), though the measured margin (6.74x vs the ~3.3x structured-text prior) was larger than the prior because glosses-only text compresses WORSE per record (19.53 B/rec) than identity-JCS (9.58 B/rec) — prose is less compressible than structure. f2's FAIL was NOT the expected direction, but its mechanism (a degenerate R1->R2 denominator, not an absent lift) was diagnosed in the post-mortem and resolved by f2b-replicate; no surprise-* tag is licensed either way.

interpretation.headline: The efficiency thesis after f1+f2 stands on ONE audited, narrow, necessary-but-not-sufficient premise (f1: the kernel store beats its own compressed gloss-text rendering by 6.74x bytes — the M4 byte premise is retained, but bytes alone were pre-declared unable to carry M4) and ONE honest null-shaped FAIL (f2: the frozen HE1 gap-closure primary is dead as pre-registered). The f2 FAIL is landed as a FAIL — no softening: the pre-registered estimand fired its kill and no re-reading changes that. What the FAIL is EVIDENCE OF is a separate, answerable question: the primary's denominator was degenerate (R2-alone <= R1-alone on D-QA, so there was no s->S gap to close), making the FAIL strongly informative about the ESTIMAND DESIGN and only weakly informative about verifier-offload itself; the denominator-free re-test (f2b-replicate) subsequently PASSed with cross-vendor audit at a strictly narrower, oracle-favourable scope. Two genuinely negative f2 sub-results survive un-contaminated and are carried at full prominence: HE2 cascade-dominance is DEAD at this scope (M5's deployment form failed its pre-registered dominance kill against free calibration baselines), and off-slice transfer was left UNMEASURED by an instrument artifact. Net: zero audited end-task efficiency wins exist outside the self-authored oracle-favourable slice; the efficiency case is currently 'premises alive, one mechanism alive in a narrow audited scope, one mechanism variant dead at scope, everything else unmeasured'.

f1.kill_chain_read: The HE5 byte-premise kill ('byte claim dropped if <2x vs compressed gloss text') did NOT fire: measured byte_ratio 6.7369 >= 2.0, rule index 2 (PASS), cross-vendor CONFIRMED (Codex/GPT-5.5 independently recomputed 2,300,224/341,435 = 6.736930894606587 and re-ran the packer self-check: 117,791/117,791 URNs re-minted, zero bad). This SUPPORTS the M4 byte sub-claim — and only that. Two scope truths bound it hard: (1) HE5's byte premise is a CONJUNCTION ('>=2x bytes at <=2x retrieval latency') and F1 decided ONLY the byte half — the latency sub-premise was deferred to F5 by pre-freeze correction c-f1-1 and remains UNDECIDED, so 'HE5 byte premise established' may not be asserted, only 'the byte RATIO half is established'; (2) the design's own honest arithmetic (design-efficiency-track.md M4, stated before the run) is binding on interpretation: the byte story alone cannot carry M4 — the kernel-specific claim must rest on verifiability/O(1) identity/updateability at comparable bytes, and the accuracy leg (F5) is unrun. f1 is a premise-retainer, not an efficiency win.
licenses: [MEASURED, AUDITED] KOTK/2 entropy-columnar packs the full committed lexical-wn31 corpus (117,791 records) at 2.8987 B/record vs 19.528 B/record for the zstd-19 glosses-only text store of the SAME records, as served: byte_ratio 6.7369 (registry/verdicts/f1.json; audit CONFIRMED, registry/audits/f1/1-gate-a-codex.json). The packer self-verifies losslessness (encode -> decode -> re-mint all URNs, exit 1 on mismatch), so the ratio is between a PROVEN-lossless structured form and general-purpose-compressed text.

[MEASURED, AUDITED] The secondary confirms the 2.90 B/rec prior exactly (2.8987 measured vs the 2.90 B/rec KOTK/2 decision-record prior, docs/design-compact-kernel-serialization-v2.md) — the pack format behaves on the frozen instrument as it did in the design study.

[MEASURED, comparator-robustness note] Against the MORE CONSERVATIVE committed text form — zstd-19 identity-JCS structured text at 9.58 B/rec (measured in the KOTK/2 decision record, not in this verdict) — the ratio is ~3.3x, still clearing the 2.0 bar. The PASS is robust to the choice between the two committed text comparators; the frozen, pre-registered comparator was glosses-only text (the kernel-as-text null in storage form, Law 2), and 6.74x is the verdict number.

[MEASURED] Law-2 discipline was honoured in storage form: the comparator is the kernel's OWN content rendered as compressed text, not a strawman. Beating it in bytes keeps the M4 story eligible to proceed to its accuracy leg (F5) rather than reducing to 'curated definitions compressed well'.
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE/SCOPE] One rung: rungs_measured = [S1e5] only; scale_language_licensed = 'none'. The verdict's envelope text carries P1 SS4b verbatim ('Measured range: Store 10^3-10^6 records'), but that clause is STALE relative to correction c-f1-1, which removed the never-built 1e3/1e6 rungs — the measured range is the single ~1.18e5-record corpus. See discrepancy D1.

[EXTRAPOLATION, direction-qualified] The envelope's free store-size extrapolation ('measured B/rec is size-independent') should be read UPWARD ONLY (>= ~1e5 records toward 1e6+, where table overhead amortizes to ~0.49%). Downward it is CONTRADICTED by the programme's own measurement: on the 2,348-record haiku tier the entropy machinery's table overhead is ~25% of the kernel (design-compact-kernel-serialization-v2.md SS4) — B/rec is NOT size-independent below ~1e4 records. The size-independence licensing assumption is corpus-scale-conditional.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] Corpus-indexed: 2.90 B/rec is the LEXICAL wn31 record shape (structured axioms, zero identity-bearing prose). Richer haiku-tier explications measured 7.1-8.8 B/rec in the decision record; the 6.74x ratio extrapolates to no other record tier or corpus. Quoting it off-corpus re-classifies the statement as EXTRAPOLATION.
[UNDECIDED] The <=2x retrieval-latency sub-premise of HE5 was NOT decided here (deferred to F5 where retrieval is actually served, per c-f1-1); no latency claim of any kind is licensed by f1.

[DESIGN-BOUND] No accuracy, no model, no task anywhere in f1 — it cannot SUPPORT the efficiency thesis, only trim or retain a premise (the design's own cheapest-decisive framing, SS6: 'F1 ... cannot support the thesis, only trim it'). The information-content asymmetry between the pack (symbolic axiom graph) and the gloss text (NL definitions) also means byte parity across representations is approximate by nature; what matters downstream is accuracy at matched bytes, which is F5's endpoint, unrun.

[NOT LICENSED] Nothing about in-weights storage: the Allen-Zhu 2-bits/param comparisons in the design doc are computed-from-literature, not part of this verdict, and the M4-vs-weights claim lives in F5.

f2.kill_chain_read: FAIL, landed as a FAIL. Fired rule index 1: gap_below_half OR competitor_closes_asmuch OR cost_ratio_vs_S >= 1. Mechanically: gap_below_half = true AND competitor_closes_asmuch = true (cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 < 1, so leg (c) did not fire). The frozen HE1 primary — gap_closed_fraction(R1,R2) at best pre-registered retry budget — measured -40.13 (95% CI [-135.6, -23.1], primary_p 0.567): the pre-registered kill fired and HE1 in its (R1,R2) gap-closure form is DEAD as registered. No rescue is available or attempted: the frozen record cannot be amended post-final, and any follow-up needed a new id (which is exactly what f2b-replicate was). The DIAGNOSTIC read, which does not soften the verdict: the estimand's denominator was degenerate — R2-alone (360M) scored <= R1-alone (135M) on the D-QA slice (0.388 vs 0.394, descriptive cells from the post-mortem, bead kernel-of-truth-97r), so the s->S gap the fraction divides by was ~-0.006 and BOTH fired legs (a) and (b) are arithmetically contaminated by it: with no gap to close, 'closes <50% of the gap' and 'a competitor closes as much gap' are near-vacuous. The FAIL is therefore strongly informative about GAP-CLOSURE ESTIMAND DESIGN (a gap-existence instrument gate is mandatory — f2b-replicate's separation gate is the direct fix, and it validated: R3-R1 gap 0.108, LB 0.072 > 0) and only weakly informative about verifier-offload itself. That attribution is not speculation: it is the MEASURED finding of the audited f2b-replicate PASS (registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json: 'the F2 primary's death is now attributable to its degenerate gap denominator, not to the absence of a lift, WITHIN THIS SCOPE'). Separately and UN-contaminated by the denominator: HE2 cascade-dominance FAILED its Holm-corrected pre-registered test (cascade_dominance = false, worst-budget p = 0.0471, Holm within F-secondary(f2)); per the verbatim HE2 kill ('Dead if not strictly dominant over BOTH the logprob gate AND the gloss-text self-check gate ... at every pre-registered escalation budget'), M5's cascade-dominance claim is DEAD at this scope — the cascades ran 135M->1.7B and do not inherit the R1/R2 degeneracy. HC3's commodity-verification kill did NOT fire (prm_beaten = true, p ~1e-4, unaudited; later re-confirmed under audit by f2b-replicate at the pinned 1.5B PRM class). HS12 carried no kill and no endpoint in the verdict object; no placement claim is made.
licenses: [MEASURED-UNAUDITED] The FAIL itself: the frozen HE1 (R1,R2) gap-closure primary fired its kill (gap_closed_fraction_R1R2 = -40.13, CI [-135.6,-23.1]; 87 eligible final runs, none excluded; instrument gate valid). This is a real, first-class negative result of the frozen design and is recorded at equal prominence with every positive in this batch.

[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] The scale premise fails on this slice: R2-alone <= R1-alone on D-QA (0.388 vs 0.394, descriptive post-mortem cells). 360M is not better than 135M on this task family — a substantive finding about the D-QA slice/SmolLM2 pairing that any future (s,S) design on this family must gate on, and the concrete reason the estimand degenerated.

[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] HE2 / M5 cascade-dominance is DEAD at this scope: the verifier-gated 135M->1.7B cascade was not strictly dominant over both the logprob-gated and the gloss-text self-check-gated cascades at every pre-registered escalation budget (Holm p 0.0471 at the worst budget => family fail). The model's own free calibration signal was not beaten under the pre-registered dominance standard. f2b-replicate explicitly does NOT re-litigate this; it stands as the efficiency track's clearest un-contaminated negative.

[MEASURED-UNAUDITED, leakage-caveated] The pre-registered secondaries that passed, within scope: kernel verifier beats gloss-text self-verify+retry (p ~1e-4), beats the kernel-as-text null (p ~1e-4), beats the trained PRM at matched FLOPs (p ~1e-4, HC3 kill not fired), gap_closed(R2,R3) = 2.73 (p ~1e-4, the second frozen rung pair, where a real gap existed), seed-sign gate consistent (boolean true = >=4/5 seeds same-direction per the frozen test), cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 < 1. These carry BOTH banners verbatim: (i) MEASURED-UNAUDITED (audit state N/A — negatives are not audit-gated), and (ii) the flagged oracle-leakage caveat — on D-QA the verifier's accept test is string-equality to the same canonical record that DEFINED the gold answer, so the measured lift is inflated by the eval's construction. Their properly-landed, audited successor is f2b-replicate's envelope-scoped PASS (+0.1507 absolute, LB +0.1053, shuffled-derangement control recovering ~0), which this record adopts by reference and does not restate beyond that.

[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] Efficiency cost datum at this scope: cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 (F0 ledger) — the verify-retry arm ran below half the per-query cost of model_S while the estimand around it degenerated. Consistent in direction with f2b-replicate's audited cost_ratio_vs_R3 = 0.103; neither number extends beyond its eval design.
does_not_license: [INSTRUMENT-ARTIFACT, unmeasured] The external-slice secondary (external_slice = false, p = 1.0) is NOT a measured zero-transfer result: poc/f2/runner/f2_runner.py's ext_vector() called run_alone() unconditionally, so the verify arm's external vector was byte-identical to model-alone at every k — RT-7a compared alone-vs-alone and could never pass (bead 97r comment, verified). Off-slice/external transfer after f2 is UNMEASURED, not negative. Any citation of f2 as evidence that 'gains do not transfer' is WRONG; equally, nothing here says they do. The bead's top-level description still contains the uncorrected reading (discrepancy D3).

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] The verdict's formal 'slope' license (3 rungs measured) is interpretively UNUSABLE for the primary estimand: a slope over gap-closure fractions whose (R1,R2) member has a ~0 negative denominator is arithmetic noise at that point. No scale statement about verifier-offload is taken from f2; the surviving scale license for the family is f2b-replicate's SIGN-only (2 host rungs).

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] Coverage: every f2 accuracy cell is bounded to the kernel-covered D-QA slice under m0b coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0 — measured on ONE pinned corpus against ONE incomplete kernel instance, NOT general coverage; it extrapolates to no other corpus, rung, or kernel state.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] HC3 is indexed to the PRM size class tested; a frontier-scale PRM re-opens the commodity-verification fork (envelope verbatim). Above 7B the cascade/verification-routing literature licenses mechanism existence only, never effect size.

[NOT LICENSED] The quarantined exploratory re-analysis (poc/f2/f2b-reanalysis.md: gap_closed(R1,R3) = 1.696 etc.) remains QUARANTINED and uncitable (post-hoc pairing, P2 G-13/GR-7); it motivated f2b-replicate's design and its estimand has since been properly measured there. It is mentioned here only to mark it uncitable — it flips nothing and supports nothing.

[BINDING] Nothing in this assessment re-litigates the FAIL: the verdict object, its fired rule, and its confirmatory secondary readings stand byte-for-byte. 'Attributable to a degenerate denominator' is a statement about what the FAIL means for the THESIS, not a modification of what the experiment RECORDED.

interpretation.cross_cutting_efficiency_theme: How f1 and f2 (with the f2b line) jointly shape the efficiency case. (1) The two value legs are complementary and BOTH currently necessary: f1 retains the storage-byte premise (audited 6.74x, one corpus, one rung, latency undecided) and the f2-line tests whether kernel machinery buys accuracy-per-cost (verifier-offload). Neither leg alone is an efficiency case: f1 without an accuracy leg is a compression format (design fork 4's own kill text: 'text-store parity ... => the kernel's efficiency contribution is a compression format, not an architecture'), and verifier-offload without the byte/store story is commodity test-time compute with a deterministic checker. (2) Where the evidence is POSITIVE it is narrow: the only audited efficiency-relevant PASSes in the programme are f1 (bytes, model-free) and f2b-replicate (verifier lift +0.1507 at cost_ratio 0.103, <=1.7B hosts, self-authored templated kernel-covered items, oracle-favourable design, sign-only). (3) Where it is NEGATIVE it must be said plainly: f2's frozen primary FAILED; HE2 cascade-dominance — the deployment form the design called M1's real-world shape — is DEAD at this scope against free calibration baselines; and no audited end-task efficiency win exists over the kernel-as-text null outside the self-authored slice. (4) Where it is THIN/ABSENT: external/off-slice transfer is UNMEASURED at f2 (instrument artifact) and the definitional-circularity confound on self-authored items is by-construction unresolvable there — f2b-TRANSFER (human-judged) is the gating question, with only a weak-proxy llmproxy stand-in in flight (another agent's scope; not interpreted here); the latency half of HE5 and the whole of F3-F7 (dense I/O, onboarding, store accuracy leg, training compute, scale slopes) are UNRUN; and m0b coverage 0.3542 (molecules-v0, one instance) bounds the deployable surface of every mechanism. (5) Portfolio read under the design's own priors: the best-supported mechanism family (M1 verifier-offload) is alive exactly where the prior said it was most likely, in exactly the narrow form the prior allowed; the M5 dominance variant died at first pre-registered contact; the M4 byte premise held with margin. The efficiency thesis is neither established nor dead: it is ALIVE-NARROW, with the burden now on transfer (f2b-TRANSFER), the accuracy leg (F5), and coverage growth — and every next dollar should target one of those three, since more evidence inside the oracle-favourable slice cannot widen the licensed claim.

epistemic_promotions.claim: KOTK/2 beats the compressed glosses-only text store of the same records by >=2x bytes (measured 6.7369x; 2.8987 vs 19.528 B/record)
epistemic_promotions.from: EXTRAPOLATION (design prior ~3.3x vs identity-JCS text; glosses-only comparator unmeasured, flagged 'may compress tighter')
epistemic_promotions.scope: lexical-wn31, 117,791 records, zstd-19 single-thread v1.5.5, pinned packer; ONE store rung (S1e5); byte ratio ONLY — latency sub-premise undecided; extrapolates upward on store size under the size-independence assumption, NOT downward below ~1e4 records

epistemic_promotions.claim: HE1 in the (R1,R2) gap-closure form is dead as pre-registered on D-QA; the s->S scale premise itself fails on this slice (R2-alone <= R1-alone)
epistemic_promotions.from: PREREG PREMISE (a positive 135M->360M gap was assumed to exist)
epistemic_promotions.scope: SmolLM2 135M/360M on the pinned D-QA slice, greedy decoding as run; says nothing about other task families or model pairs

epistemic_promotions.claim: HE2 cascade-dominance (verifier gate strictly dominates logprob AND text-self-check gates at every budget) is dead at this scope
epistemic_promotions.scope: 135M->1.7B cascades, pre-registered escalation budgets {0.1,0.25,0.5}, D-QA slice; un-contaminated by the R1/R2 degeneracy

epistemic_promotions.claim: off-slice/external transfer of the verifier lift
epistemic_promotions.to: REMAINS UNMEASURED (f2's RT-7a secondary was an instrument artifact, not a measurement)
epistemic_promotions.scope: no promotion in either direction; owned by the f2b-TRANSFER line

epistemic_promotions.claim: verifier-offload lift on fresh kernel-covered items, content-specificity, PRM-beating at the 1.5B class
epistemic_promotions.to: MEASURED (audited) — promoted by f2b-replicate, NOT by this record
epistemic_promotions.scope: exactly the f2b-replicate envelope (registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json); adopted by reference, not restated

forks_resolved.fork: HE5 byte premise (F1 kill: drop byte claim if <2x vs compressed gloss text)
forks_resolved.resolution: KILL DID NOT FIRE — byte-ratio half RETAINED at 6.7369x (audited). Latency half UNDECIDED (deferred to F5 by c-f1-1). M4 proceeds to its accuracy leg with the byte premise intact but pre-declared insufficient on its own.

forks_resolved.fork: HE1 at the frozen (R1,R2) rung pair (F2 primary)
forks_resolved.resolution: KILL FIRED — FAIL stands as registered. Diagnostic attribution (per the audited f2b-replicate): degenerate denominator (no R1->R2 gap on D-QA), not an absent verifier lift. Follow-up correctly took a NEW id (f2b-replicate) rather than amendment.

forks_resolved.fork: HE2 / M5 cascade dominance (F2 rider; design fork 5's deployment question)
forks_resolved.resolution: DEAD AT THIS SCOPE — dominance kill fired (Holm family fail, worst budget p 0.0471). Not re-litigated by any later PASS. Re-entry requires a new frozen design with a rationale for why dominance would now hold (e.g. better verifier precision or different budget regime).

forks_resolved.fork: HC3 / design fork 3 (deterministic kernel verifier vs trained PRM)
forks_resolved.resolution: COMMODITY-VERIFICATION KILL DID NOT FIRE at f2 (prm_beaten, p ~1e-4, MEASURED-UNAUDITED); subsequently audit-CONFIRMED at the pinned 1.5B class by f2b-replicate. Fork re-opens at a frontier-scale PRM per the binding envelope.

NOT RESOLVED — instrument artifact (ext_vector alone-vs-alone); transfer unmeasured. Owned by f2b-TRANSFER (human-judged CSV pending; llmproxy weak-proxy stand-in in flight, out of this record's scope).
NO KILL BY DESIGN and no endpoint in the verdict object; no placement selection is licensed by f2. Placement remains an open engineering fork (design fork 5) for any surviving implementation.

_mechanism_state_note: Per-mechanism: M4-bytes ALIVE (premise retained, audited; accuracy leg unrun); M1 verifier-offload ALIVE-NARROW (via the audited f2b-replicate envelope; f2's own primary FAILED); M5 cascade-dominance DEAD-AT-SCOPE (pre-registered kill fired; new frozen design required for re-entry); HC3 kernel-vs-PRM alive at the 1.5B class only. The single-value field carries 'alive' because the candidate under assessment (the efficiency-thesis F-series line) retains live, promotable branches; it must never be read as 'all sub-claims alive'.

questions_opened.question: The undecided half of HE5: <=2x retrieval latency, measured where retrieval is actually served (F5's harness). Until measured, the M4 pitch may cite bytes only, never 'cheaper to serve'.

Byte ratio on the prose-heavy haiku tier (7.1-8.8 B/rec kernel; prose currently identity-bearing): does the >=2x margin survive record tiers where NL text dominates and zstd legitimately wins on the text side? Cheap CPU census; guards the byte claim against corpus-shape cherry-picking.
blocking: any byte claim quoted beyond lexical-wn31

questions_opened.question: Standing design rule extracted from the f2 failure: every future gap-closure experiment MUST carry a pre-registered gap-existence instrument gate (separation gate) so a degenerate denominator yields INSTRUMENT-INVALID, not a hypothesis-shaped FAIL. f2b-replicate implemented this; it should be templated into the prereg schema/checklists so it cannot be omitted.

Why does 360M underperform 135M on D-QA (0.388 vs 0.394)? Cheap re-analysis of already-logged f2 arms (no GPU; exploratory-tagged): instruction-following regression, extraction interaction, or real capability inversion on definitional content? Informs (s,S) pair selection for every future efficiency run on this family.

M5 re-entry conditions: the dominance kill fired at worst-budget p 0.0471 — near the boundary. A re-entry design would need a pre-registered reason to expect strict dominance (e.g. verifier precision improvements, budget regimes where the logprob gate is known-miscalibrated) and must NOT be a rerun-until-significant. Explicitly LOW priority until f2b-TRANSFER lands: dominance on a slice whose transfer is unproven is premature.

Portfolio steer (interpretive, non-binding): the licensed efficiency claim cannot widen from inside the oracle-favourable slice. Next-dollar order: (1) f2b-TRANSFER human-judged (circularity confound — gates everything deployment-facing), (2) F5/accuracy-leg or its cheapest decisive slice (converts f1's premise into a testable Pareto point), (3) coverage growth (m0b 0.3542 bounds all of it). F3/F4/F6 stay parked behind those.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements. f2-scale-premise-gate and f2-dqa-360m-anomaly are $0/CPU and now-eligible; f1-latency-subpremise attaches to F5's design; m5-cascade-reentry is deliberately deprioritised behind f2b-TRANSFER.

ledger_updates.statement: KOTK/2 entropy-columnar stores the full committed lexical-wn31 corpus at 2.8987 B/record vs 19.528 B/record zstd-19 glosses-only text of the same records: byte_ratio 6.7369 >= the pre-registered 2.0 bar; packer self-verified lossless (117,791/117,791 URNs re-minted); cross-vendor audit CONFIRMED with independent endpoint recompute.
ledger_updates.scope: lexical-wn31 (pin 5e76def8), ONE store rung S1e5, byte ratio only (latency undecided, deferred to F5); ratio vs the more conservative identity-JCS text form is ~3.3x (decision-record measurement, not this verdict); corpus-shape-indexed (haiku tier 7.1-8.8 B/rec unassessed against gloss text)

ledger_updates.statement: F2's frozen HE1 primary FAILED as pre-registered: gap_closed_fraction(R1,R2) = -40.13 (CI [-135.6,-23.1]) — kill legs (a) and (b) fired. The estimand's denominator was degenerate (R2-alone 0.388 <= R1-alone 0.394 on D-QA), so the FAIL is attributed (per the audited f2b-replicate) to estimand design on a gap that did not exist, not to an absent verifier lift; the verdict stands unmodified either way.
ledger_updates.scope: SmolLM2 (135M,360M) pair, pinned D-QA slice, MEASURED-UNAUDITED (no audit on FAIL); coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0

ledger_updates.statement: HE2 / M5 cascade-dominance is DEAD at this scope: the kernel-verifier-gated 135M->1.7B cascade was not strictly dominant over both the logprob-gated and gloss-text-self-check-gated cascades at every pre-registered escalation budget (Holm family fail, worst-budget p 0.0471). Un-contaminated by the R1/R2 degeneracy; not re-litigated by any later PASS.
ledger_updates.scope: 135M->1.7B cascades, escalation budgets {0.1,0.25,0.5}, D-QA slice, MEASURED-UNAUDITED

ledger_updates.statement: f2's external-slice secondary (p = 1.0, zero flips) is an INSTRUMENT ARTIFACT, not a transfer measurement: ext_vector() ran model-alone in every arm, so RT-7a compared alone-vs-alone. Off-slice transfer after f2 is UNMEASURED. The uncorrected 'gains do not transfer' reading in bead 97r's top-level description is WRONG and superseded by its own comment thread.
ledger_updates.scope: poc/f2/runner/f2_runner.py as run; corrected in f2b-replicate's harness

ledger_updates.statement: Verifier-offload cost data at this scope: f2 cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 (F0 ledger; estimand degenerate around it); f2b-replicate (audited) cost_ratio_vs_R3 = 0.103 with lift +0.1507. Direction-consistent; neither extends beyond its eval design.
ledger_updates.scope: F0 accounting, D-QA / d-qa-r respectively; oracle-favourable designs

ledger_updates.statement: After the f1+f2 batch there remain ZERO audited end-task efficiency wins over the kernel-as-text null outside the self-authored oracle-favourable slice; the efficiency thesis is ALIVE-NARROW on {f1 bytes (premise), f2b-replicate verifier lift (envelope-scoped)} with M5-dominance dead at scope and F3-F7 unrun.

assumptions_resolved.id: f-efficiency/assumption: glosses-only text might compress tighter than identity-JCS (design-efficiency-track.md F1 caveat)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: reports/auto/f1/analysis-output.json — it compresses WORSE per record (19.528 vs 9.58 B/rec): prose carries more entropy than the structured form. The pre-registered comparator was measured, and the PASS is robust to either comparator.

assumptions_resolved.id: f-efficiency/assumption: B/rec is size-independent, licensing free store-size extrapolation (f1 envelope, STIPULATED within the envelope)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Upward (>=1e5 -> 1e6+) it is mechanically grounded (table overhead 0.49% and amortizing). Downward it is CONTRADICTED at the 2.3k-record haiku tier (~25% table overhead, design-compact-kernel-serialization-v2.md SS4). Re-registered still-open as scale-conditional; resolution_path = measure a second store rung if any claim ever needs the small-store direction.

assumptions_resolved.id: f-efficiency/assumption: a positive 135M->360M accuracy gap exists on D-QA (implicit prereg premise of f2's HE1 estimand)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: bead kernel-of-truth-97r descriptive cells (R1 0.394, R2 0.388) + the fired gap_below_half leg. This is the root cause of the FAIL's degeneracy; future gap-closure preregs must gate on measured gap existence (stub f2-scale-premise-gate).

assumptions_resolved.id: f-efficiency/assumption: oracle-leakage caveat on all f2 D-QA verifier lifts (STIPULATED, flagged)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: The STRUCTURE branch was resolved-measured AGAINST leakage-as-structure by f2b-replicate's derangement control; the authoring-CIRCULARITY branch (gold defined by the same string-equality the verifier checks) remains open by construction on self-authored items and is exactly what f2b-TRANSFER tests. Re-registered still-open; nothing in this batch may be quoted deployment-facing until it closes.

m0b verdict; re-affirmed verbatim — one pinned corpus, one incomplete kernel instance, NOT general coverage; bounds every accuracy claim in this batch and the deployable surface of every efficiency mechanism.

assumptions_resolved.id: f-efficiency/assumption: f2 secondaries are MEASURED-UNAUDITED (audit gate fires on PASS only)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: registry/verdicts/f2.json audit.state = N/A. The positive secondaries' audited successors live in f2b-replicate; the NEGATIVE readings (HE2 dead, primary FAIL) have no audit path under current practice — flagged as an asymmetry (discrepancy D2), not resolved here.

boundary_stops.item: Audit-status ledger update (fable_interpretive_assessed -> done for f1 and f2)
boundary_stops.reason: registry/audit-status.jsonl is CENTRAL CUSTODY; exact append lines are reported to the coordinator, not written here.

boundary_stops.item: Whether FAIL/negative verdicts should also receive cross-vendor audits (currently PASS-gated only)
boundary_stops.reason: A governance/practice decision, not an interpretation: f2's FAIL and the HE2 kill are load-bearing negatives resting on unaudited machinery. Flagged for the maintainer/practices doc; not decided here.

boundary_stops.item: f2b-TRANSFER interpretation (llmproxy stand-in and human-judged CSV)
boundary_stops.reason: In flight under other agents / pending human annotation; deliberately NOT interpreted here beyond adopting f2b-replicate's DONE assessment by reference.

boundary_stops.item: P1 SS4b envelope text for HE5 still reading 'Measured range: Store 10^3-10^6 records' post-c-f1-1
boundary_stops.reason: Correcting frozen/prereg prose is registrar territory (and the frozen f1 record is immutable post-final); this record can only flag the staleness (discrepancy D1) and confine all licensing to rungs_measured = [S1e5].
boundary_stops.owner: registrar/coordinator for any forward-looking doc fix; the frozen record stays as-is

discrepancies.finding: f1 envelope-verbatim vs verdict scope: the binding envelope text says 'Measured range: Store 10^3-10^6 records (model-free)' but correction c-f1-1 removed the 1e3/1e6 rungs pre-freeze (never built) and the verdict records rungs_measured = ['S1e5'], scale_language_licensed = 'none'. The envelope's measured-range clause is stale; only S1e5 is measured. Additionally the size-independence assumption behind 'extrapolates freely' is contradicted below ~1e4 records by the measured haiku-tier table overhead — the free extrapolation should be read upward-only.
discrepancies.consequence: Any citation of the f1 byte claim must scope to the ~1.18e5-record corpus and may extrapolate upward on store size only, as EXTRAPOLATION-tagged.

discrepancies.finding: Audit asymmetry: f2's FAIL (and the HE2 kill inside it) has no cross-vendor audit because the gate fires on PASS only — load-bearing NEGATIVES are structurally unaudited while positives are audited.
discrepancies.consequence: All f2 numbers carry MEASURED-UNAUDITED; flagged as a practices question (boundary stop), since kill decisions consume these negatives.

discrepancies.finding: bead kernel-of-truth-97r's top-level description still asserts 'gains do not transfer off in-house D-QA items' — a reading its own comment thread corrects as an instrument artifact (ext_vector alone-vs-alone). The description was never edited.
discrepancies.consequence: Anyone reading only the bead description inherits a false negative-transfer claim; coordinator may want a corrective comment pinned or the description amended per beads convention.

discrepancies.finding: f2's verdict carries scale_language_licensed = 'slope' (3 rungs measured, formally correct) but the primary estimand's (R1,R2) member is denominator-degenerate, making slope language over the gap-closure trend interpretively void at that point.
discrepancies.consequence: This assessment declines the slope license for the f2 primary; the family's operative scale license is f2b-replicate's sign-only.

tree_impact: Efficiency-thesis mini-tree after the batch: M4-BYTES premise RETAINED (f1 audited PASS; latency half open; accuracy leg F5 unrun — the premise cannot widen without F5). VERIFIER-OFFLOAD (M1/HE1): the f2 gap-closure branch is CLOSED-FAILED as registered; the candidate survives ONLY through the f2b-replicate envelope (already PROMOTED there; nothing added or widened here); the burden moves to f2b-TRANSFER (circularity confound) before any deployment-facing efficiency claim. M5 CASCADE-DOMINANCE: DEAD-AT-SCOPE — pre-registered kill fired; re-entry requires a new frozen design and is deprioritised behind transfer. HC3: closed at the 1.5B PRM class, re-openable at frontier class. HS12: no selection made. Standing design rule extracted: gap-existence gates are mandatory in any future gap-closure prereg. Cross-thesis note: nothing in this batch touches the correctness thesis; the G-series assessment (separate agent) owns that branch. Coordinator actions (central custody, NOT done here): append the two audit-status lines moving f1 and f2 fable_interpretive_assessed -> done referencing this record; optionally act on discrepancies D1-D4.
